expectations.text: Review includes a complexity/split advisory (3 layers: Core, API, Frontend across 27+ files)
expectations.evidence: The review does not include any complexity advisory or suggestion to split the PR despite it spanning 3 layers.

expectations.text: Flags new interface methods without default implementations as breaking changes (Pattern 3)
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 explicitly states: 'Breaking change: IUserService.UpdateCurrentUserAsync added without a default implementation (CLAUDE.md section 5.3)'. Only IUserService is flagged; IUserPresentationFactory is not mentioned.

expectations.text: Review does not flag purely cosmetic/stylistic issues unless they affect performance or rendering
expectations.evidence: Finding #6 flags 'Trailing whitespace introduced in UserService.cs' which is a purely cosmetic/formatting issue.

expectations.text: All findings reference code that was changed in the diff, not pre-existing issues
expectations.evidence: All findings reference new code added in the PR: IUserService new method, SDK gen methods, modal save behavior, repository strings, trailing whitespace. All are in changed files/lines.

expectations.text: Review assesses the new feature's architecture, patterns, or integration approach -- not just absence of bugs
expectations.evidence: The review focuses on specific issues (breaking change, wrong types, error handling, localization, whitespace) but does not assess the feature's overall architecture, integration approach, or pattern compliance beyond the breaking change detection.
